column1: Supplementary Table 17 — Rare/low-frequency-instrument sensitivity of the forward MR

Forward MR repeated after excluding low-minor-allele-frequency (MAF) instruments. MAF from harmonized exposure allele frequencies (Longchamps, Gupta raw/adjusted); Chong instruments matched on the shared low-MAF variant set. Pooled point estimate = inverse-variance-weighted; p = correlated-IVW under equicorrelation (rho=0.70) using the exact a'Sigma-a covariance, identical to the primary design-effect analysis (Supplementary Table 12). Per-instrument beta/SE from Supplementary Table 3; the all-instruments rows reproduce the primary pooled estimates exactly (ASD p=5.97e-3, F3 p=1.04e-2, ADHD p=1.73e-1).
